purpose: The heart of the plugin. Implements PluginController: registers the 14-entry FuncItem command array (Markdown++ toggle Ctrl+Shift+M, Refresh, Copy HTML, Export HTML, Export PDF, Print, Open-automatically/Sync/Mermaid toggles, About), reacts to NPPN_READY/NPPN_TBMODIFICATION/NPPN_BUFFERACTIVATED/NPPN_SHUTDOWN plus Scintilla SCN_MODIFIED/SCN_UPDATEUI, installs ComCtl32 subclass procs on both Scintilla views to detect viewport changes, debounces re-renders via SetTimer, runs two-way scroll sync between editor and preview with throttle + cross-direction suppression, dynamically inserts the Preview-update-delay submenu using NPPM_ALLOCATECMDID, resolves markdown link clicks (file/anchor/external), drives Export HTML / Export PDF / Print, and persists options through PluginOptionsStore.
exports: PluginController::Instance / SetModule / Initialize / GetFunctions / Name / MessageProc / OnNotification / Shutdown
PluginController::TogglePreview / RefreshPreview / CopyRenderedHtml / ExportHtml / ExportPdf / PrintPreview / ShowAbout
calls_out_to: Notepad++ NPPM_GETCURRENTSCINTILLA / NPPM_GETPLUGINSCONFIGDIR / NPPM_GETFULLCURRENTPATH / NPPM_GETCURRENTDIRECTORY / NPPM_GETFILENAME / NPPM_SETMENUITEMCHECK / NPPM_ALLOCATECMDID / NPPM_DOOPEN

Scintilla SCI_GETLENGTH / SCI_GETTEXT / SCI_GETFIRSTVISIBLELINE / SCI_GETLINECOUNT / SCI_LINESONSCREEN / SCI_VISIBLEFROMDOCLINE / SCI_DOCLINEFROMVISIBLE / SCI_GETCURRENTPOS / SCI_LINEFROMPOSITION / SCI_LINESCROLL
Markdown++ internals: MarkdownRenderer::BuildPreview/BuildStandaloneDocument, CopyHtmlToClipboard, PreviewWindow, PluginOptionsStore, WinUtil helpers
invariants: Instance() is the only way to access the controller and it is process-singleton.
RegisterCommands runs at most once (guarded by commandsRegistered_); GetFunctions calls it lazily so it works whether Notepad++ asks first via setInfo or via getFuncsArray.
Debounce submenu installation requires both NPPM_ALLOCATECMDID and a successful FindPluginMenu - both happen in EnsureDebounceSubmenu under NPPN_READY/NPPN_TBMODIFICATION.

Scroll-sync correctness depends on the suppress timers (suppressEditorToPreviewUntil_ / suppressPreviewToEditorUntil_, kCrossScrollSuppressMs=260ms) and the throttle (kScrollSyncThrottleMs=50ms); both directions must update the bookkeeping fields they read to avoid feedback loops.

Render debouncing uses SetTimer(hwnd=nullptr,...) with a static TIMERPROC that routes back through Instance() and the timer id stored in renderDebounceTimer_; CancelScheduledRender / Shutdown must KillTimer.
gotchas: kDebounceDelaysMs is {0, 80, 140, 250, 500} - the submenu shows '0 ms (immediate)' for the first entry; changing the array changes both the submenu and the persisted-value validation surface.

ResolvePreviewLinkPath strips fragment/query, URL-decodes, handles file: URIs via PathCreateFromUrlW, canonicalizes Windows paths, and falls back to CombinePath against the current Notepad++ directory for relative links. Only markdown-extension files that exist are actually opened via NPPM_DOOPEN.
ChooseExportPath uses OFN_NOCHANGEDIR; without it GetSaveFileNameW would silently switch the process CWD and break later file-relative logic.
Editor scroll-ratio uses (lineCount - linesOnScreen) as the denominator with a min-of-1 clamp; for documents shorter than the viewport the ratio collapses to 0.

ExportPdf and PrintPreview both refuse if preview is not Ready and instead pop a 'try again after the preview finishes loading' dialog - this is by design because WebView2 PrintToPdf needs documentLoaded_=true.
